item0.revisionNotes: Fixed typo and clarified that “OP” stands for Overland Park, and added the states for each city.

text.text: Our internal internship program is back this fall with new opportunities.

Your next opportunity for career growth is here! 

BrandB Accelerator returns this fall for a third cohort with new roles, workshops, leader roundtables, and networking sessions.

Applications are open now through May 31.

If you’re a recent or soon-to-be college graduate looking to put your degree to work, check out BrandB Accelerator’s opportunities to build your capabilities and expand your connections.
We heard from People Leaders that you’d like more opportunities to explore what’s next. We’re excited to expand eligibility for the fall 2026 program to Retail Store Managers!

text_1743194291_copy.text:
• BrandB Accelerator is an internal internship program open to all full-time and part-time non-people leaders, Retail Store Managers, Care Managers, and Growth & Emerging Business Coaches who are recent or soon-to-be college grads.
  • The fall cohort runs from August 17 through October 30.
  • If you’re currently part-time, you’ll need to be able to work full-time (40 hours/week) to participate.
  • Opportunities are hosted in Overland Park, KS, Frisco, TX, and a few limited opportunities in Bellevue, WA — we’ve got your short-term housing covered.
  • If you’re successful in your internship, the goal is to convert when the program ends.
  • If converted, you'll be asked to relocate after completing your internship.

text_2142635906_copy.text:
1. Log in to Workday.
  2. In the Menu, select Career.
  3. On the next page, under View, choose Find Career Opportunities.
  4. Search for “BrandB Accelerator” to check out opportunities.

Learn more: Check out the BrandB Accelerator Internal Application Guide.

text.text:
If you’re trying to prepare for the next move, check out ‘always on’ career resources:

  • Keep your profile updated and validate your skills through Skill Scout in Teams. Skill Scout is an AI bot that looks at your Workday Career Profile details (job history, education, certifications, and goals) and sends you skill suggestions via Teams. Once confirmed, it adds them to your profile. Get started by chatting ‘hello’ to the Skill Scout app in Teams.  
  • Check out Career Pathfinder to help you map your journey with common career paths and roles at Site B, including job details, required skills, pay, and current openings.
  • Explore further in Development & Growth on BrandB Pulse.
